sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44198" key="eu)kata/praktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκατά-πρακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n44198.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily accomplished</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:161" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.161</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
